## 1. Executive Summary
Project progress is currently at 33% completion (1 out of 3 tasks finalized). The primary achievement involves the completion of the v2.4.1 release note draft (Internal). Current operations are transitioning from immediate version maintenance toward high-level roadmap planning and technical specification reviews.

## 2. Pending & Risks
- Next quarter roadmap meeting (From: Chulsoo Park (Internal), To: Minjun Lee (Internal), Date: 04-03)
- New API specification review (From: Minjun Lee (Internal), To: Eunseo Choi (Internal), Date: 04-02)

## 3. Management Gap
No management gap identified

## 4. Strategic Insights
The current task sequence indicates a movement from short-term release documentation to long-term strategic alignment. Finalizing the API specification review is a necessary prerequisite to ensure the technical viability of the upcoming quarterly roadmap. Maintaining the current momentum in planning will be essential for stabilizing the transition between release cycles.
